title: Lombina: April Fools
description: Collection of Malay and Malay (Jawi) translation packs for various April Fools versions
body:
# Lombina: April Fools | لومبينا: اڤريل فول‌س **What does this project add? / Apa yang ditambahkan dalam projek ini?**
- This project adds translations for all April Fools versions starting from 15w14a in Malay, Malay (Jawi), as well as languages included in the "[Lombina: Englishlah & Melayunya](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lombina-englishlah-melayunya)" language pack (for the April Fools 2024 pack and beyond).
Pek ini menambah terjemahan untuk semua versi April Fools bermula dari 15w14a dalam bahasa Melayu (Rumi dan Jawi), dan juga bahasa-bahasa yang disertakan dalam pek bahasa "[Lombina: Englishlah & Melayunya](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lombina-englishlah-melayunya)" (untuk versi April Fools 2024 dan seterusnya). **Why "Lombina"? / Kenapa "Lombina"?**
- The direct translation of "Mine" and "Craft" is "**Lomb**ong" dan "**Bina**" respectively. That is then merged into "Lombina". And that name kind of fits as a name for this series of "joke" packs. [Thanks Ahmad!](https://imgur.com/a/lombina-idea-xvWXUYX)
Terjemahan "Mine" dan "Craft" secara terus ialah "**Lomb**ong" dan "**Bina**". Kedua perkataan tersebut kemudian digabung menjadi "Lombina". Dan nama itu agak sesuai untuk koleksi pek "lawak" ini. [Terima kasih Ahmad!](https://imgur.com/a/lombina-idea-xvWXUYX) --- **Available Versions / Versi Tersedia**
| April Fools | Version Name | Support | Bahasa Melayu
(Rumi Malay) | بهاس ملايو
(Jawi Malay) | [Englishlah & Melayunya](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lombina-englishlah-melayunya)
Joke Pack | Download | | :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: | | 2015 | [15w14a](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_15w14a) | Full | ✔️ | ✔️ | ❌ᵇ | [⬇️](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lombina-april-fools/versions?g=15w14a)

v1.0 | | 2019 | [3D Shareware v1.34](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_3D_Shareware_v1.34) | Fullᶜ | ✔️ | ✔️ | ❌ᵇ | [⬇️](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lombina-april-fools/versions?g=3D-Shareware-v1.34)
v1.0 | | 2020 | [20w14∞](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_20w14%E2%88%9E) | Full | ✔️ | ✔️ | ❌ᵇ | [⬇️](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lombina-april-fools/versions?g=20w14infinite)
v1.0 | | 2022 | [22w13oneBlockAtATime](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_22w13oneBlockAtATime) | Full | ✔️ | ✔️ | ❌ᵇ | [⬇️](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lombina-april-fools/versions?g=22w13oneblockatatime)
v1.0 | | 2023 | [23w13a_or_b](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_23w13a_or_b) | Full | ✔️ | ✔️ | ❌ᵇ | [⬇️](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lombina-april-fools/versions?g=23w13a_or_b)
v1.0 | | 2024 | [24w14potato](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_24w14potato) | Partialᵃ | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | [⬇️](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lombina-april-fools/versions?g=24w14potato)
v1.0 | | 2025 | [25w14craftmine](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_25w14craftmine) | Full | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | [⬇️](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lombina-april-fools/versions?g=25w14craftmine)
v1.0 | - a = Does not include translation for the "potato poem" - b = Pack does not (really) support versions prior to 1.20 (aka April Fools 2024 version) - c = Some strings are hardcoded and cannot be translated into Malay
Resource Pack Pairing

- Lombina: April Fools - This pack
Pek yang ini - Lombina: Englishlah & Melayulah - Enables the joke language options, also adds it's own splash texts set. For version 24w14potato and above only.
Mendayakan pilihan bahasa lawak, juga menambah set teks tampilannya tersendiri. Untuk versi 24w14potato dan ke atas sahaja. - JawiCraft Language Pack - Enables the Jawi Malay language option, also adds it's own splash texts set. Recommended for versions 23w13a_or_b and below only.
Mendayakan pilihan tulisan Jawi, juga menambah set teks tampilannya tersendiri. Disarankan untuk versi 23w13a_or_b dan ke bawah sahaja. - BetterMalay Language Pack - Improves the Malay translations, also adds it's own splash texts set. Recommended for versions 23w13a_or_b and below only.
Menambah baik terjemahan Bahasa Melayu Rumi, juga menambah set teks tampilannya tersendiri. Disarankan untuk versi 23w13a_or_b dan ke bawah sahaja. - Untuk JawiCraft dan BetterMalay, susunan kedua pack ini boleh diubah bergantung kepada set teks tampilan/splash text mana yang ingin digunakan. Dan kebanyakan teks tampilan yang disertakan dalam JawiCraft hanya boleh dipaparkan dengan betul jika pilihan bahasa Melayu bertulisan Jawi dipilih dalam permainan (`بهاس ملايو (مليسيا)`).
